results.title: Ripple Tank

checks.notes: Ripple tank interference field with two draggable sources

layout.title: Ripple Tank — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Two wave sources interfering. Drag a source to move it and watch the pattern shift. Canvas 2D with per-pixel field rendering.
layout.readout: Drag either dot. Bright bands = constructive interference, dark = destructive.
layout.stageAria: Ripple tank interference field with two draggable sources

results.title: Coulomb's Law
results.description: Drag charges and watch inverse-square forces.

checks.notes: Two draggable point charges in their electric field with force arrows

layout.title: Coulomb's Law — Kevin Arifin
layout.lead: Drag the two charges. The force grows not linearly but with 1/r² — move them twice as close and it gets four times stronger. Flip a sign to switch attract/repel. Canvas 2D · physics.
layout.readout: Separation r = 48 · force 3.9 (relative), attracting. Halve r → 4× the force.
layout.stageAria: Two draggable point charges in their electric field with force arrows

mobileLayout.title: Coulomb's Law — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.lead: Drag the two charges. The force grows not linearly but with 1/r² — move them twice as close and it gets four times stronger. Flip a sign to switch attract/repel. Canvas 2D · physics.
mobileLayout.readout: Separation r = 48 · force 3.9 (relative), attracting. Halve r → 4× the force.
mobileLayout.stageAria: Two draggable point charges in their electric field with force arrows

results.title: 800 VDC Power Delivery
results.description: Higher voltage cuts current and busbar heat.

checks.notes: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC — Kevin Arifin
Power busbar feeding a GPU rack; thickness is copper, glow is heat loss

layout.title: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC — Kevin Arifin
layout.h1: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC
layout.lead: A fixed power load at a higher voltage draws less current — and resistive heat falls with the square of current. Pick a bus voltage and watch the busbar. Canvas 2D · AI infrastructure.
layout.readout: At 48 V, a 120 kW rack pulls 2,500 A · busbar wastes 9,375 W (7.81%) as heat · needs 278× the copper of an 800 V bus.
layout.stageAria: Power busbar feeding a GPU rack; thickness is copper, glow is heat loss

mobileLayout.title: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC — Kevin Arifin
mobileLayout.h1: Why Data Centers Went to 800 VDC
mobileLayout.lead: A fixed power load at a higher voltage draws less current — and resistive heat falls with the square of current. Pick a bus voltage and watch the busbar. Canvas 2D · AI infrastructure.
mobileLayout.readout: At 48 V, a 120 kW rack pulls 2,500 A · busbar wastes 9,375 W (7.81%) as heat · needs 278× the copper of an 800 V bus.
mobileLayout.stageAria: Power busbar feeding a GPU rack; thickness is copper, glow is heat loss
